column1: # ZAP baseline triage — one rule per line: <pluginId>\t<WARN|IGNORE|FAIL>\t<note>
# IGNORE: known noise on a JSON API, not worth a report.
# WARN (default for everything else): visible in the report, does not fail the job.
# Header findings are deliberately left at WARN because they are tracked as
# BUG-010 (infrastructure headers leak) and BUG-011 (missing security headers).

column3: Timestamp Disclosure — epoch values in JSON payloads, not sensitive here
Information Disclosure: Suspicious Comments — false positives on data strings
Non-Storable Content — irrelevant for a stateless JSON API
